content:
[CONTEXT]: User wants to know where global skills, rules, and hooks are configured for a Claude Code / OhMyOpenCode agent setup on macOS. Working directory is /Users/wjx/code/Awesome-Researcher-Agent.

[GOAL]: Find all global configuration files for: skills, rules, hooks, and CLAUDE.md — their exact paths and directory structures.

[DOWNSTREAM]: I will report the exact file locations to the user so they know where to configure each component.

[REQUEST]: Search the following locations and report what exists:
1. ~/.claude/ — list all files and subdirectories recursively
2. Look for: CLAUDE.md, skills/, rules/, hooks/, settings.json or settings files
3. Also check if there's anything in the current project: /Users/wjx/code/Awesome-Researcher-Agent/.claude/
Return: exact paths of all config files found, organized by category (skills / rules / hooks / main config).
<!-- OMO_INTERNAL_INITIATOR -->
